sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89549" key="proskatasu/rw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσκατα-σύρω</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῡ]</pron>, <sense id="n89549.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pull down besides</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χερὶ Ἄδωνιν</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.174</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Lucill.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
